meta.description: Skill-to-trait gate mapping for Genomebook v2. Each skill requires minimum trait scores (gates) and uses trait scores to configure parameters. Skills are heritable because trait scores derive from diploid loci via Mendelian inheritance.

pubmed-search.description: Search PubMed for recent papers on a gene or disease term

search_breadth.description: Passed to synthesis prompt: broad vs narrow framing

pubmed-search.returns: list[dict] with keys: title, authors, journal, date, abstract, pmid, url

gwas-variant-lookup.description: Federated variant query across 9 genomic databases (Ensembl, GWAS Catalog, Open Targets, etc.)
gwas-variant-lookup.returns: dict with keys: merged (full results), summary (key stats)

prs-calculator.description: Calculate polygenic risk scores for common diseases from genotype data

min_overlap.description: Risk-tolerant agents accept lower SNP overlap

prs-calculator.returns: dict with keys: results (per-score list), scores_calculated, disclaimer

equity-assessment.description: Assess population representation and genetic diversity using HEIM scoring

weights.description: HEIM component weights (RI, HB, FC, GS)

equity-assessment.returns: dict with keys: heim_result, summary (heim_score, rating, n_samples, n_populations)

clinpgx-lookup.description: Query ClinPGx database for gene-drug pharmacogenomic associations

thoroughness.description: Passed to synthesis: how deeply to interpret results

clinpgx-lookup.returns: dict with gene-drug associations, guidelines, evidence levels

hypothesis-generation.description: Generate novel scientific hypotheses by combining evidence from multiple sources
hypothesis-generation.returns: Structured hypothesis: claim, mechanism, testable prediction, confidence

literature-synthesis.description: Synthesise findings across multiple papers into a coherent narrative

breadth.description: Higher openness = wider scope of synthesis

literature-synthesis.returns: Structured synthesis: key findings, consensus, contradictions, gaps
